{% endif %} {% if waitlist_position %}

{{ settings.payment_instructions }}

{% endif %}
Booth fee
${{ "%.2f" | format(booth_type.price / 100) }}
{% if fee_cents > 0 %}
Processing fee (non-refundable)
${{ "%.2f" | format(fee_cents / 100) }}
{% endif %}
Total
${{ "%.2f" | format(total_cents / 100) }}
{% if settings and settings.refund_policy %}

Refund policy: {{ settings.refund_policy }}

{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% if registration.status == "paid" or registration.amount_paid %}
Payment
{% if registration.amount_paid %}
Amount Paid
${{ "%.2f" | format(registration.amount_paid / 100) }}
{% endif %} {% if registration.processing_fee %}
Processing Fee (non-refundable)
${{ "%.2f" | format(registration.processing_fee / 100) }}
{% endif %} {% if registration.refund_amount %}
Refund

{% endif %}

{{ registration.rejected_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') }}
